text:
the morning session is live.

golden city skyline. fresh mug on the desk.
the first lines of code before the world gets loud.

afrofuturist sunrise lo-fi — warm rhodes chords,
soft dusty drums, and smooth bass
for builders who start before the noise begins.

where technology meets culture.

press play. lock in. build.

now live on YouTube. link in bio.

visual.openai_prompt: Create a cinematic lo-fi anime-inspired Afrofuturist coding studio scene for Layer8Culture Radio (not photorealistic). A Black creator is seated FROM BEHIND at a premium coding workstation, calm and focused, wearing a black hoodie with a large number 8 on the back (no face reveal). Multiple monitors show code and a subtle line graph; a laptop with code; a warm desk lamp whose amber glow blends with incoming sunrise light; a fresh coffee or tea mug with steam catching the first warm light of morning; plants and hanging vines; books on system design, clean code, and algorithms; West African-inspired pottery and design objects; a warm wood desk; and a blank blue neon sign panel on the wall (an unlit, lettering-free glowing panel — do NOT render any text or letters; branding is composited in afterward). Through a large window is a futuristic African city skyline at golden sunrise — a warm amber and orange sun cresting the horizon behind tall Afrofuturist towers, the sky layering from soft Sunrise Amber #FFB347 and Warm Gold #F5A524 at the horizon up through pale blue overhead, the city bathed in the clean warm light of early morning, soft mist at the lower skyline, a few slow flying vehicles catching the sunrise glow. The mood is fresh, optimistic, and deeply focused — the quiet first hour of the build. Color palette: Sunrise Amber #FFB347, Warm Gold #F5A524, pale blue overhead, Deep Black #030508 background, Electric Blue #0047FF monitor glow as a cool counterpoint. Afrofuturist city view, Black coder or student seated from behind, warm desk lamp, calm study atmosphere, loopable visual, gentle motion potential, culturally intentional objects, futuristic but grounded, balanced electric-blue and warm gold lighting. Leave the lower third as clean, uncluttered negative space for composited headline typography. reel.sora_prompt: A calm cinematic Afrofuturist lo-fi anime studio at cosmic midnight. The Black creator seated from behind at their workstation is nearly still — a slow, unhurried camera drift forward as stars and the faint arc of distant city satellites move imperceptibly across the deep-space sky beyond the large window. The Afrofuturist city towers glow with electric-blue and neon-cyan light far below. Inside, the warm amber desk lamp holds steady, steam curls almost invisibly from a mug on the warm wood desk, a plant sways once in a slow breath of ambient air. The motion is meditative, cosmic, and loopable — the scale of the universe as backdrop for the quiet focus of a single builder at work. Clean output — no on-screen text.

visual.openai_prompt: Create a cinematic lo-fi anime-inspired Afrofuturist coding studio scene for Layer8Culture Radio (not photorealistic). The monitors and desk lamp are impressionistic pools of light — Electric Blue #0047FF and Warm Gold #F5A524 reduced to soft glowing halos that bleed at the edges. A blank blue neon sign panel glows faintly on the wall (no text, no letters). Subtle waveform arc lines or circuit-inspired geometry float lightly at the frame edges — barely visible, like the texture of the air. The upper half and center of the frame are intentionally spare and dark, creating clean negative space for the composited quote headline. text:
